motion.name: Surgical Ease
motion.purpose: Smooth, exponential entry for all components.

components.name: Primary CTA
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #FFFFFF; color: #000000; padding: 16px 32px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { padding-right: 40px; background: #f0f0f0; }

components.name: Social Link
components.description: Subtle glass button for secondary links.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); color: #FFFFFF; padding: 16px 32px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); transition: all 0.3s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 4px 12px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 9999px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-dot { width: 4px; height: 4px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #E87E53; animation: ds-pulse 2s infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.4; } 100% { opacity: 1; } }

narrative.overview: The Neural Laboratory is a visual system designed to feel like a high-precision research instrument. It balances the raw, experimental energy of cutting-edge AI with the surgical precision of an engineer who masters multiple domains.
keyCharacteristics: Surgical Precision: Perfect alignment and generous, intentional whitespace.
Experimental Glows: Subtle radial gradients and blurs mimic neural activity.
Tactile Interactivity: Reactive elements with smooth, exponential motion.
dos: Do use linear-gradient text for primary brand names.
Do maintain a strict grid even in experimental sections.
donts: Don't use generic box-shadows; use tonal or glass layering instead.
Don't use more than one accent color (Neural Ember only).
